TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Lung-san-se, title = Lung-san-se, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lung-san-se} }

S.FORM: == Lung-san-seťĺćŚĪĪŚĮļ == Lung-san-se u han-cun-fuo-ciw a biyu. yadah ku lung-san-se, hatidaay nu lung-san-se namakaydaay namin i Fu-cin-sen cun-cuo-hu cin-cen-sin cun-an-sin an-hay lung-san-se nikakenihan a nipatidengan. an-hay-lung-san-se u sakasiidaay nu biyuan, namaka Ten-kaw-cu-u-de yen-nen "siwcaywal mihcaan" malingatu a patideng, min-tay-ten-ci tulu mihcaan caynemtulu mihcaan a misangan, tadaaenengan u kun-in-pu-sa " yadahay ku lima a misamiay", ayda u Hu-cin-sen tuudan kumidiptay, walu a bataan idaw ku pitu nu luitan. aayaw a ngangan nu lung-san-se naw u " ten-cu-se" atu " pu-sin-tin, nikudan nu kitidaan i An-hay-cen lung-sa a buyuan, sumad han ku ngangan u lung-san-se. . i cuwacuwaay a kitidaan nu biyuanŚźĄŚúįŚąÜťĚą cin-cuo u Cun-kuo-ta-lu-niyaduan, yadah ku mabulaway katukuh i wali timul atu Tay-wan, manglay pakakapah, talum' tu taydan i lung-san-se a nidumaan a nipatidenagn, alahican miawda tu bunsan tayda i lung-san-se, idaw ku sumaden nanay malakun-in-si, cu-lin-se atu duma a nganganan, amica anu u cin-cen a itdaay tu a biyuan atu namaka hekalay nu bayuan a nipatidengan a biyuan, i kalepacawan kanca idaw ku nipamelawan tu namaka biyuay a kawawan, sisa kapah ku namaka cuwacuwaay a nutaydaay a tademawan. . Cin-cuo tademaw namaka Min-caw hedek tu mihcaan malingatu, yadah ku itidaay a tademaw mabulaw taynin i Tay-wan, min-cen-un-li patu a mihcaan " caynemlimlu mihcaan", An-hay-lung-san-se bunsang ci Caw-ci itida i Tay-wan Lu-kan patideng tu lung-san-se, sapatideng a zayliw namaka Cin-cen, nisangaan tu ba'tu a tula namaka Cin-cen sayhu anituktukan, tabakiay a aaenengan nu " yadahay nu mataan lima" papaduhepitan i cabengay namaka An-hay-lung-sa-se. . Cin-cing-lung-san-se śôČśĪüťĺćŚĪĪŚĮļ Cin-cing-lung-san-se, itida i Cin-cing-lung-san-se Cun-cuo-se-cin-cing-se An-hay-cen a niyadu'an, sa u An-hay-lung-san-se, An-hay sumamad u Cun-an, sa u Cun-an lung-san-si, usinganganay a Kun-in-se, tadasami u Kun-in-samian, ayda u Fu-cin-sen-wen-u'-kun-ku mikuwanay, makaala tu malebut a mihcaan nu luitan. idaw ku cacayay a nipkulitan tu aadihan " tung-sen-suo-yen" uci min-caw a mihudiay a tademaw ci Cen-zuy-tu anipabelian, idaw ku ni Hung-yi-fa-se a nisulitan tu hudian. yu sumamad milimad tu hay-lin, sisa mapeci' ku biyu, misangaay a tademaw itida i kan-si lima a bataan idaw ku pitu a mihcaan " caypiccaywal mihcaan" cin-hay-huo ci Se-ling, iluc ni Se-ling ci Se-taw ku misanganay a patideng. taw-kun sabaw cacay a mihcaan "caywallucay mihcaan" tastaseng naca ku malumanay pabaluhay a misangan, naw kila ku cuked mala ba'tuay tu ku cuked, nu lalaku cabeng malacenga tu ku cabeng, pana nu kawili Kawana u ba'tu t uku sangan tu balau'd, micunus tu ta-sun-paw-tin, singanganan nu tahudan atu matinengay tu sakay babalakian a luma'an, katukuh ayda makaala tu caywalsep nu luitan. ,ŤŅĄšĽäÁīĄ180ŚĻīś≠∑ŚŹ≤. sumamad a nipiasip tu sami, u namaka han-yi "Avalokitasvara", u "ciw-in", "sin-in-sen", ci cu-fa-hu buensan pangiha han u "kun-se-in-pu-sa", nan-pei-cew Yiw-cin a ciw-muo-luo-se-fa-se u " kun-se-in-pu-sa". "Avalokitasvara",Áāļ"ťóöťü≥","ÁŹĺťü≥ŤĀ≤", ". Tan-tay sen-cung fa-se misangaay tu sasakamuen a tademaw saan tu fan-yi " AvalokiteŇõvara" u kun-ce-cay-pu-sa". "Avalokita" u "kun", " iŇõvara" u "sakalihalay", u sakalihalay tu udip nai' ku nidatengan sa, sisa ci Sen-cun kamuhan nida u kun-ce-cay-pu-sa, mahini nu aydaay a " pan-nuo-sin-cin". "AvalokiteŇõvara"Áāļ"ŤßÄŤá™Śú®ŤŹ©ŤĖ©"."Avalokita"Áāļ"ŤßÄ","iŇõvara"Áāļ"Ťá™Śú®", ". ilaylayan u, tan-tay-cun ci Li-se-min a ngangan idaw ku " se" hananay a sulitan, mangalay misakenis, sisa itawya "kun-se-in-pu-sa" sumad han tu "kun-in-pu-sa", nika idaw ku duma a sasakamuen u "kun-in-pu-sa" u " kun-se-in-pu-sa" a madayumay a sasakamuen. tang-tay-cin-len-cen-kun fua-se san tu itida i fan-wen-ku cudadan idaw ku tusaay a caayay kalecad nu nganganan, caysiwtupic mihcaan Sin-cing namaka lalaay a cudad nisulitan tu nalimaan yu sumamad sa, u ŗ§Öŗ§Ķŗ§≤ŗ•čŗ§ēŗ§Ņŗ§§ŗ§łŗ•ćŗ§Ķŗ§į "Avalokitasvara" u kun-in-pu-sa a ngangan, ciw-muo-luo-se pilecuhan i Si-yi kitidaan, nikaadihan tatengan uyniyan a cudadan sa. Sisa, kun-in-pu-sa caay kaw nikapiliyasan a nikatahekalan, saan namaka Tang-tay-sen-in a nakamuan, hakiya namaka caayay kalecad nu kitidaan a kamuan sa. (Avalokitasvara) svara),śĄŹśÄĚÁāļ"ŤĀ≤ťü≥",Avalokitasvara . kun-se-in-pu-sa sipakayda i sulit a mikayseku u "kun-ca-se-cin suni" a sami, namaka "miaw-fa-lin-cin" a "kun-se-in-pu-sa-pu-men-pin", anu idaw ku lasubu malebut wang yi a tademawan, malabades, makatengil tu kun-se-in-pu-sa, cacay ku balucuay a ngangan, kun-se-in-pu-sa kasenusa tu kun-ci-in-sen, amahulak namin." idaw aca ku kamu, " anu idaw ku katuuday a tademaw, yadah ku la'cusay a nisimsiman, a hina asip tu kun-se-in-pu-sa, kiya mahulak ku la'cusay namaka balucu'ay. anu yadah saca ku biyalaw tu sakay luma'an, kahina asip tu kun-se-in-pu-sa, kiya miliyas t uku la'cusay tu namaka balucu'ay". " ." kun-se-in-pu-sa itida i Cen-wen ŗĹ¶ŗĺ§ŗĺĪŗĹďŗľčŗĹĘŗĹ¶ŗľčŗĹāŗĹüŗĹ≤ŗĹāŗĹ¶ŗľčŗĹĎŗĹĖŗĹĄŗľčŗĹēŗĺĪŗĹīŗĹā " sulit nu Ceng-yi, J√§nr√§sigwangchug", u " kun-ce-cay" a imian, mahida ni Sen-cung ku nikasengian tu nakamuan. u ceng-wen hananay " kun-ce-cay" lima a puu'an ku ceng-yi, hatidaay nu sulitan a Ceng-wen, atu namaka lawayay u "Jairaisig" "kun, "yen-se" tulu a batacan, putunen ku wangjug " ce-cay" tusaay a batacan. :J√§nr√§sigwangchug),šĻüśėĮ"ŤßÄŤá™Śú®"šĻčśĄŹ, "Jairaisig "šłČŚÄčťü≥ÁĮÄ,ŤÄĆÁúĀÁē•šļÜ"wangjug "ŚÖ©ŚÄčťü≥ÁĮÄ. itida i Ta-cung-hua kitidaan a mipaypayay atu duma a mipaypayay itini i papalutatengaan a pay-yi-kun-in, pay-yi-ta-se, kun-in-ma namakayda i Tang-caw micung palutatengaan a PńĀndara vńĀsinńę, u tatayna a kun-in-pu-sa, cinida u kun-in-mu u lin-hu-pu-mu atu lin-hu-pu-cu, caayay kalecad nu aasipen idaw ku caayay kalecad nu sulitan, itini ni pu-kun nibelihan tu cudadan a " itida i pu-ti nakamuan tu cacayay a sulitan nu ten-lun-wan-cin" u pay-yu-kun-ce-cay, atu " u cudacudadan nu aasipen a sakay samiay nu cudadan" ngangan han u pay-yi-kun-se-in-pu-sa, pay-sen-kun-in, itini i san-u-wuy anibalihan tu cudad a "su-si-ti-ciw-luo-cin"ngangan u kun-in-mu, idaw henay ci san-u-uy nakamuan tu nisulitan a "ta-pi-lu-su'-na-cen-fuo-cin-su" ngangan u pay-cu-cuen, kun-in-mu sidumaaca tu pangangan ci nidaanu lien-hu-pu-cu. PńĀndara vńĀsinńę, . katukuh i Sun-tay-cun a cudad, nibelihan ni Zu-se a " saan ku di'tu tayni ku cin-kan-san-yi satalakaway nu caculimekan a cudad" atu " hatidaay a niculimekan nu kasinganganan a sakakaay ci Wan-yi-kuy" u ngangan ci Pay-yi-pu-sa, pusa u satabakiay a tademaw u ihekalay i tamtamdawan pangangan han cinida ci Pay-yi-ta-se han kunikasinganganan. .

¶un-an-sin an-ńßaj r~…ĺuŇč-san-s…ô nikak…ônińßan a nipatid…ôŇčan. an-ńßaj-r~…ĺuŇč-san-s…ô u sakasiidaaj nu bijuan, namaka t…ôn-kaw- ¶u-u-d…ô j…ôn-n…ôn "siw ¶ajwar~…ĺ mińß ¶aan" mar~…ĺiŇčatu a patid…ôŇč, min-taj-t…ôn- ¶i tur~…ĺu mińß ¶aan ¶ajn…ômtur~…ĺu mińß ¶aan a misaŇčan, tadaa…ôn…ôŇčan u kun-in-pu-sa " jadańßaj ku r~…ĺima a misamiaj", ajda u ńßu- ¶in-s…ôn tuudan kumidiptaj, war~…ĺu a ° ku biju, misaŇčaaj a tad…ômaw itida i kan-si r~…ĺima a bataan idaw ku pitu a mińß ¶aan " ¶ajpi ¶ ¶ajwar~…ĺ mińß ¶aan" ¶in-ńßaj-ńßuo ¶i s…ô-r~…ĺiŇč, ir~…ĺu ¶ ni s…ô-r~…ĺiŇč ¶i s…ô-taw ku misaŇčanaj a patid…ôŇč. taw-kun sabaw ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aan " ¶ajwar~…ĺr~…ĺu ¶aj mińß ¶aan" tastas…ôŇč na ¶a ku mar~…ĺumanaj pabar~…ĺuńßaj a misaŇčan, naw kir~…ĺa ku ¶uk…ôd mar~…ĺa ba Ē~ °tuaj tu ku ¶uk…ôd, nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaku ¶ab…ôŇč mar~…ĺa ¶…ôŇča tu ku ¶ab…ôŇč, pana nu kawir~…ĺi kawana u ba Ē~ °tu t uku saŇčan tu bar~…ĺau Ē~ °d, mi ¶unus tu ta-sun-paw-tin, siŇčaŇčanan nu tańßudan atu matin…ôŇčaj tu sakaj babar~…ĺakian a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an, katukuńß ajda makaar~…ĺa tu ¶ajwar~…ĺs…ôp nu r~…ĺuitan. ,*********. sumamad a nipiasip tu sami, u namaka ńßan-ji "a*ar~…ĺokitas*ara", u " ¶iw-in", "sin-in-s…ôn", ¶i ¶u-fa-ńßu bu…ônsan paŇčińßa ńßan u "kun-s…ô-in-pu-sa", nan-p…ôi- ¶…ôw jiw- ¶in a ¶iw-muo-r~…ĺuo-s…ô-fa-s…ô u " kun-s…ô-in-pu-sa". "a*ar~…ĺokitas*ara",*"**","***", ". tan-taj s…ôn- ¶uŇč fa-s…ô misaŇčaaj tu sasakamu…ôn a tad…ômaw saan tu fan-ji " a*ar~…ĺokit…ô**ara" u kun- ¶…ô- ¶aj-pu-sa". "a*ar~…ĺokita" u "kun", " i**ara" u "sakar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj", u sakar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj tu udip nai Ē~ ° ku nidat…ôŇčan sa, sisa ¶i s…ôn- ¶un kamuńßan nida u kun- ¶…ô- ¶aj-pu-sa, mańßini nu ajdaaj a " pan-nuo-sin- ¶in". "a*ar~…ĺokit…ô**ara"*"*****"."a*ar~…ĺokita"*"*","i**ara"*"**", ". ir~…ĺajr~…ĺajan u, tan-taj- ¶un ¶i r~…ĺi-s…ô-min a ŇčaŇčan idaw ku " s…ô" ńßananaj a sur~…ĺitan, maŇčar~…ĺaj misak…ônis, sisa itawja "kun-s…ô-in-pu-sa" sumad ńßan tu "kun-in-pu-sa", nika idaw ku duma a sasakamu…ôn u "kun-in-pu-sa" u " kun-s…ô-in-pu-sa" a madajumaj a sasakamu…ôn. taŇč-taj- ¶in-r~…ĺ…ôn- ¶…ôn-kun fua-s…ô san tu itida i fan-w…ôn-ku ¶udadan idaw ku tusaaj a ¶aajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu ŇčaŇčanan, ¶ajsiwtupi ¶ mińß ¶aan sin- ¶iŇč namaka r~…ĺar~…ĺaaj a ¶udad nisur~…ĺitan tu nar~…ĺimaan ju sumamad sa, u *********** "a*ar~…ĺokitas*ara" u kun-in-pu-sa a ŇčaŇčan, ¶iw-muo-r~…ĺuo-s…ô pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i si-ji kitidaan, nikaadińßan tat…ôŇčan ujnijan a ¶udadan sa. sisa, kun-in-pu-sa ¶aaj kaw nikapir~…ĺijasan a nikatańß…ôkar~…ĺan, saan namaka taŇč-taj-s…ôn-in a nakamuan, ńßakija namaka ¶aajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu kitidaan a kamuan sa. (a*ar~…ĺokitas*ara) s*ara),***"**",a*ar~…ĺokitas*ara . kun-s…ô-in-pu-sa sipakajda i sur~…ĺit a mikajs…ôku u "kun- ¶a-s…ô- ¶in suni" a sami, namaka "miaw-fa-r~…ĺin- ¶in" a "kun-s…ô-in-pu-sa-pu-m…ôn-pin", anu idaw ku r~…ĺasubu mar~…ĺ…ôbut waŇč ji a tad…ômawan, mar~…ĺabad…ôs, makat…ôŇčir~…ĺ tu kun-s…ô-in-pu-sa, ¶a ¶aj ku bar~…ĺu ¶uaj a ŇčaŇčan, kun-s…ô-in-pu-sa kas…ônusa tu kun- ¶i-in-s…ôn, amańßur~…ĺak namin." idaw a ¶a ku kamu, " anu idaw ku katuudaj a tad…ômaw, jadańß ku r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj a nisimsiman, a ńßina asip tu kun-s…ô-in-pu-sa, kija mańßur~…ĺak ku r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj namaka bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °aj. anu jadańß sa ¶a ku bijar~…ĺaw tu sakaj r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an, kańßina asip tu kun-s…ô-in-pu-sa, kija mir~…ĺijas t uku r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj tu namaka bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °aj". " ." kun-s…ô-in-pu-sa itida i ¶…ôn-w…ôn ********************** " sur~…ĺit nu ¶…ôŇč-ji, **nr*sigwaŇč ¶ńßug", u " kun- ¶…ô- ¶aj" a imian, mańßida ni s…ôn- ¶uŇč ku nikas…ôŇčian tu nakamuan. u ¶…ôŇč-w…ôn ńßananaj " kun- ¶…ô- ¶aj" r~…ĺima a puu Ē~ °an ku ¶…ôŇč-ji, ńßatidaaj nu sur~…ĺitan a ¶…ôŇč-w…ôn, atu namaka r~…ĺawajaj u "*airaisig" "kun, "j…ôn-s…ô" tur~…ĺu a bata ¶an, putun…ôn ku waŇčjug " ¶…ô- ¶aj" tusaaj a bata ¶an. :**nr*sigwaŇč ¶ńßug),**"***"**, "*airaisig "****,****"waŇčjug "****. itida i ta- ¶uŇč-ńßua kitidaan a mipajpajaj atu duma a mipajpajaj itini i papar~…ĺutat…ôŇčaan a paj-ji-kun-in, paj-ji-ta-s…ô, kun-in-ma namakajda i taŇč- ¶aw mi ¶uŇč par~…ĺutat…ôŇčaan a p*ndara **sin*, u tatajna a kun-in-pu-sa, ¶inida u kun-in-mu u r~…ĺin-ńßu-pu-mu atu r~…ĺin-ńßu-pu- ¶u, ¶aajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu aasip…ôn idaw ku ¶aajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu sur~…ĺitan, itini ni pu-kun nib…ôr~…ĺińßan tu ¶udadan a " itida i pu-ti nakamuan tu ¶a ¶ajaj a sur~…ĺitan nu t…ôn-r~…ĺun-wan- ¶in" u paj-ju-kun- ¶…ô- ¶aj, atu " u ¶uda ¶udadan nu aasip…ôn a sakaj samiaj nu ¶udadan" ŇčaŇčan ńßan u paj-ji-kun-s…ô-in-pu-sa, paj-s…ôn-kun-in, itini i san-u-wuj anibar~…ĺińßan tu ¶udad a "su-si-ti- ¶iw-r~…ĺuo- ¶in"ŇčaŇčan u kun-in-mu, idaw ńß…ônaj ¶i san-u-uj nakamuan tu nisur~…ĺitan a "ta-pi-r~…ĺu-su Ē~ °-na- ¶…ôn-fuo- ¶in-su" ŇčaŇčan u paj- ¶u- ¶u…ôn, kun-in-mu sidumaa ¶a tu paŇčaŇčan ¶i nidaanu r~…ĺi…ôn-ńßu-pu- ¶u. p*ndara **sin*, . katukuńß i sun-taj- ¶un a ¶udad, nib…ôr~…ĺińßan ni zu-s…ô a " saan ku di Ē~ °tu tajni ku ¶in-kan-san-ji satar~…ĺakawaj nu ¶a ¶ur~…ĺim…ôkan a ¶udad" atu " ńßatidaaj a ni ¶ur~…ĺim…ôkan nu kasiŇčaŇčanan a sakakaaj ¶i wan-ji-kuj" u ŇčaŇčan ¶i paj-ji-pu-sa, pusa u satabakiaj a tad…ômaw u ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj i tamtamdawan paŇčaŇčan ńßan ¶inida ¶i paj-ji-ta-s…ô ńßan kunikasiŇčaŇčanan. .
S.FORM: == Lung-san-seťĺćŚĪĪŚĮļ == Lung-san-se u han-cun-fuo-ciw a biyu. yadah ku lung-san-se, hatidaay nu lung-san-se namakaydaay namin i Fu-cin-sen cun-cuo-hu cin-cen-sin cun-an-sin an-hay lung-san-se nikakenihan a nipatidengan. an-hay-lung-san-se u sakasiidaay nu biyuan, namaka Ten-kaw-cu-u-de yen-nen "siwcaywal mihcaan" malingatu a patideng, min-tay-ten-ci tulu mihcaan caynemtulu mihcaan a misangan, tadaaenengan u kun-in-pu-sa " yadahay ku lima a misamiay", ayda u Hu-cin-sen tuudan kumidiptay, walu a bataan idaw ku pitu nu luitan. aayaw a ngangan nu lung-san-se naw u " ten-cu-se" atu " pu-sin-tin, nikudan nu kitidaan i An-hay-cen lung-sa a buyuan, sumad han ku ngangan u lung-san-se. . i cuwacuwaay a kitidaan nu biyuanŚźĄŚúįŚąÜťĚą cin-cuo u Cun-kuo-ta-lu-niyaduan, yadah ku mabulaway katukuh i wali timul atu Tay-wan, manglay pakakapah, talum' tu taydan i lung-san-se a nidumaan a nipatidenagn, alahican miawda tu bunsan tayda i lung-san-se, idaw ku sumaden nanay malakun-in-si, cu-lin-se atu duma a nganganan, amica anu u cin-cen a itdaay tu a biyuan atu namaka hekalay nu bayuan a nipatidengan a biyuan, i kalepacawan kanca idaw ku nipamelawan tu namaka biyuay a kawawan, sisa kapah ku namaka cuwacuwaay a nutaydaay a tademawan. . Cin-cuo tademaw namaka Min-caw hedek tu mihcaan malingatu, yadah ku itidaay a tademaw mabulaw taynin i Tay-wan, min-cen-un-li patu a mihcaan " caynemlimlu mihcaan", An-hay-lung-san-se bunsang ci Caw-ci itida i Tay-wan Lu-kan patideng tu lung-san-se, sapatideng a zayliw namaka Cin-cen, nisangaan tu ba'tu a tula namaka Cin-cen sayhu anituktukan, tabakiay a aaenengan nu " yadahay nu mataan lima" papaduhepitan i cabengay namaka An-hay-lung-sa-se. . Cin-cing-lung-san-se śôČśĪüťĺćŚĪĪŚĮļ Cin-cing-lung-san-se, itida i Cin-cing-lung-san-se Cun-cuo-se-cin-cing-se An-hay-cen a niyadu'an, sa u An-hay-lung-san-se, An-hay sumamad u Cun-an, sa u Cun-an lung-san-si, usinganganay a Kun-in-se, tadasami u Kun-in-samian, ayda u Fu-cin-sen-wen-u'-kun-ku mikuwanay, makaala tu malebut a mihcaan nu luitan. idaw ku cacayay a nipkulitan tu aadihan " tung-sen-suo-yen" uci min-caw a mihudiay a tademaw ci Cen-zuy-tu anipabelian, idaw ku ni Hung-yi-fa-se a nisulitan tu hudian. yu sumamad milimad tu hay-lin, sisa mapeci' ku biyu, misangaay a tademaw itida i kan-si lima a bataan idaw ku pitu a mihcaan " caypiccaywal mihcaan" cin-hay-huo ci Se-ling, iluc ni Se-ling ci Se-taw ku misanganay a patideng. taw-kun sabaw cacay a mihcaan "caywallucay mihcaan" tastaseng naca ku malumanay pabaluhay a misangan, naw kila ku cuked mala ba'tuay tu ku cuked, nu lalaku cabeng malacenga tu ku cabeng, pana nu kawili Kawana u ba'tu t uku sangan tu balau'd, micunus tu ta-sun-paw-tin, singanganan nu tahudan atu matinengay tu sakay babalakian a luma'an, katukuh ayda makaala tu caywalsep nu luitan. ,ŤŅĄšĽäÁīĄ180ŚĻīś≠∑ŚŹ≤. sumamad a nipiasip tu sami, u namaka han-yi "Avalokitasvara", u "ciw-in", "sin-in-sen", ci cu-fa-hu buensan pangiha han u "kun-se-in-pu-sa", nan-pei-cew Yiw-cin a ciw-muo-luo-se-fa-se u " kun-se-in-pu-sa". "Avalokitasvara",Áāļ"ťóöťü≥","ÁŹĺťü≥ŤĀ≤", ". Tan-tay sen-cung fa-se misangaay tu sasakamuen a tademaw saan tu fan-yi " AvalokiteŇõvara" u kun-ce-cay-pu-sa". "Avalokita" u "kun", " iŇõvara" u "sakalihalay", u sakalihalay tu udip nai' ku nidatengan sa, sisa ci Sen-cun kamuhan nida u kun-ce-cay-pu-sa, mahini nu aydaay a " pan-nuo-sin-cin". "AvalokiteŇõvara"Áāļ"ŤßÄŤá™Śú®ŤŹ©ŤĖ©"."Avalokita"Áāļ"ŤßÄ","iŇõvara"Áāļ"Ťá™Śú®", ". ilaylayan u, tan-tay-cun ci Li-se-min a ngangan idaw ku " se" hananay a sulitan, mangalay misakenis, sisa itawya "kun-se-in-pu-sa" sumad han tu "kun-in-pu-sa", nika idaw ku duma a sasakamuen u "kun-in-pu-sa" u " kun-se-in-pu-sa" a madayumay a sasakamuen. tang-tay-cin-len-cen-kun fua-se san tu itida i fan-wen-ku cudadan idaw ku tusaay a caayay kalecad nu nganganan, caysiwtupic mihcaan Sin-cing namaka lalaay a cudad nisulitan tu nalimaan yu sumamad sa, u ŗ§Öŗ§Ķŗ§≤ŗ•čŗ§ēŗ§Ņŗ§§ŗ§łŗ•ćŗ§Ķŗ§į "Avalokitasvara" u kun-in-pu-sa a ngangan, ciw-muo-luo-se pilecuhan i Si-yi kitidaan, nikaadihan tatengan uyniyan a cudadan sa. Sisa, kun-in-pu-sa caay kaw nikapiliyasan a nikatahekalan, saan namaka Tang-tay-sen-in a nakamuan, hakiya namaka caayay kalecad nu kitidaan a kamuan sa. (Avalokitasvara) svara),śĄŹśÄĚÁāļ"ŤĀ≤ťü≥",Avalokitasvara . kun-se-in-pu-sa sipakayda i sulit a mikayseku u "kun-ca-se-cin suni" a sami, namaka "miaw-fa-lin-cin" a "kun-se-in-pu-sa-pu-men-pin", anu idaw ku lasubu malebut wang yi a tademawan, malabades, makatengil tu kun-se-in-pu-sa, cacay ku balucuay a ngangan, kun-se-in-pu-sa kasenusa tu kun-ci-in-sen, amahulak namin." idaw aca ku kamu, " anu idaw ku katuuday a tademaw, yadah ku la'cusay a nisimsiman, a hina asip tu kun-se-in-pu-sa, kiya mahulak ku la'cusay namaka balucu'ay. anu yadah saca ku biyalaw tu sakay luma'an, kahina asip tu kun-se-in-pu-sa, kiya miliyas t uku la'cusay tu namaka balucu'ay". " ." kun-se-in-pu-sa itida i Cen-wen ŗĹ¶ŗĺ§ŗĺĪŗĹďŗľčŗĹĘŗĹ¶ŗľčŗĹāŗĹüŗĹ≤ŗĹāŗĹ¶ŗľčŗĹĎŗĹĖŗĹĄŗľčŗĹēŗĺĪŗĹīŗĹā " sulit nu Ceng-yi, J√§nr√§sigwangchug", u " kun-ce-cay" a imian, mahida ni Sen-cung ku nikasengian tu nakamuan. u ceng-wen hananay " kun-ce-cay" lima a puu'an ku ceng-yi, hatidaay nu sulitan a Ceng-wen, atu namaka lawayay u "Jairaisig" "kun, "yen-se" tulu a batacan, putunen ku wangjug " ce-cay" tusaay a batacan. :J√§nr√§sigwangchug),šĻüśėĮ"ŤßÄŤá™Śú®"šĻčśĄŹ, "Jairaisig "šłČŚÄčťü≥ÁĮÄ,ŤÄĆÁúĀÁē•šļÜ"wangjug "ŚÖ©ŚÄčťü≥ÁĮÄ. itida i Ta-cung-hua kitidaan a mipaypayay atu duma a mipaypayay itini i papalutatengaan a pay-yi-kun-in, pay-yi-ta-se, kun-in-ma namakayda i Tang-caw micung palutatengaan a PńĀndara vńĀsinńę, u tatayna a kun-in-pu-sa, cinida u kun-in-mu u lin-hu-pu-mu atu lin-hu-pu-cu, caayay kalecad nu aasipen idaw ku caayay kalecad nu sulitan, itini ni pu-kun nibelihan tu cudadan a " itida i pu-ti nakamuan tu cacayay a sulitan nu ten-lun-wan-cin" u pay-yu-kun-ce-cay, atu " u cudacudadan nu aasipen a sakay samiay nu cudadan" ngangan han u pay-yi-kun-se-in-pu-sa, pay-sen-kun-in, itini i san-u-wuy anibalihan tu cudad a "su-si-ti-ciw-luo-cin"ngangan u kun-in-mu, idaw henay ci san-u-uy nakamuan tu nisulitan a "ta-pi-lu-su'-na-cen-fuo-cin-su" ngangan u pay-cu-cuen, kun-in-mu sidumaaca tu pangangan ci nidaanu lien-hu-pu-cu. PńĀndara vńĀsinńę, . katukuh i Sun-tay-cun a cudad, nibelihan ni Zu-se a " saan ku di'tu tayni ku cin-kan-san-yi satalakaway nu caculimekan a cudad" atu " hatidaay a niculimekan nu kasinganganan a sakakaay ci Wan-yi-kuy" u ngangan ci Pay-yi-pu-sa, pusa u satabakiay a tademaw u ihekalay i tamtamdawan pangangan han cinida ci Pay-yi-ta-se han kunikasinganganan. .
S.PHON: == r~…ĺuŇč-san-s…ô*** == r~…ĺuŇč-san-s…ô u ńßan- ¶un-fuo- ¶iw a biju. jadańß ku r~…ĺuŇč-san-s…ô, ńßatidaaj nu r~…ĺuŇč-san-s…ô namakajdaaj namin i fu- ¶in-s…ôn ¶un- ¶uo-ńßu ¶in- ¶…ôn-sin ¶un-an-sin an-ńßaj r~…ĺuŇč-san-s…ô nikak…ônińßan a nipatid…ôŇčan. an-ńßaj-r~…ĺuŇč-san-s…ô u sakasiidaaj nu bijuan, namaka t…ôn-kaw- ¶u-u-d…ô j…ôn-n…ôn "siw ¶ajwar~…ĺ mińß ¶aan" mar~…ĺiŇčatu a patid…ôŇč, min-taj-t…ôn- ¶i tur~…ĺu mińß ¶aan ¶ajn…ômtur~…ĺu mińß ¶aan a misaŇčan, tadaa…ôn…ôŇčan u kun-in-pu-sa " jadańßaj ku r~…ĺima a misamiaj", ajda u ńßu- ¶in-s…ôn tuudan kumidiptaj, war~…ĺu a bataan idaw ku pitu nu r~…ĺuitan. aajaw a ŇčaŇčan nu r~…ĺuŇč-san-s…ô naw u " t…ôn- ¶u-s…ô" atu " pu-sin-tin, nikudan nu kitidaan i an-ńßaj- ¶…ôn r~…ĺuŇč-sa a bujuan, sumad ńßan ku ŇčaŇčan u r~…ĺuŇč-san-s…ô. . i ¶uwa ¶uwaaj a kitidaan nu bijuan**** ¶in- ¶uo u ¶un-kuo-ta-r~…ĺu-nijaduan, jadańß ku mabur~…ĺawaj katukuńß i war~…ĺi timur~…ĺ atu taj-wan, maŇčr~…ĺaj pakakapańß, tar~…ĺum Ē~ ° tu ¶in- ¶…ôn a itdaaj tu a bijuan atu namaka ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj nu bajuan a nipatid…ôŇčan a bijuan, i kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan kan ¶a idaw ku nipam…ôr~…ĺawan tu namaka bijuaj a kawawan, sisa kapańß ku namaka ¶uwa ¶uwaaj a nutajdaaj a tad…ômawan. . ¶in- ¶uo tad…ômaw namaka min- ¶aw ńß…ôd…ôk tu mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu, jadańß ku itidaaj a tad…ômaw mabur~…ĺaw tajnin i taj-wan, min- ¶…ôn-un-r~…ĺi patu a mińß ¶aan " ¶ajn…ômr~…ĺimr~…ĺu mińß ¶aan", an-ńßaj-r~…ĺuŇč-san-s…ô bunsaŇč ¶i ¶aw- ¶i itida i taj-wan r~…ĺu-kan patid…ôŇč tu r~…ĺuŇč-san-s…ô, sapatid…ôŇč a zajr~…ĺiw namaka ¶in- ¶…ôn, nisaŇčaan tu ba Ē~ °tu a tur~…ĺa namaka ¶in- ¶…ôn sajńßu anituktukan, tabakiaj a aa…ôn…ôŇčan nu " jadańßaj nu mataan r~…ĺima" papaduńß…ôpitan i ¶ab…ôŇčaj namaka an-ńßaj-r~…ĺuŇč-sa-s…ô. . ¶in- ¶iŇč-r~…ĺuŇč-san-s…ô ***** ¶in- ¶iŇč-r~…ĺuŇč-san-s…ô, itida i ¶in- ¶iŇč-r~…ĺuŇč-san-s…ô ¶un- ¶uo-s…ô- ¶in- ¶iŇč-s…ô an-ńßaj- ¶…ôn a nijadu Ē~ °an, sa u an-ńßaj-r~…ĺuŇč-san-s…ô, an-ńßaj sumamad u ¶un-an, sa u ¶un-an r~…ĺuŇč-san-si, " tuŇč-s…ôn-suo-j…ôn" u ¶i min- ¶aw a mińßudiaj a tad…ômaw ¶i ¶…ôn-zuj-tu anipab…ôr~…ĺian, idaw ku ni ńßuŇč-ji-fa-s…ô a nisur~…ĺitan tu ńßudian. ju sumamad mir~…ĺimad tu ńßaj-r~…ĺin, sisa map…ô ¶i Ē~ ° ku biju, misaŇčaaj a tad…ômaw itida i kan-si r~…ĺima a bataan idaw ku pitu a mińß ¶aan " ¶ajpi ¶ ¶ajwar~…ĺ mińß ¶aan" ¶in-ńßaj-ńßuo ¶i s…ô-r~…ĺiŇč, ir~…ĺu ¶ ni s…ô-r~…ĺiŇč ¶i s…ô-taw ku misaŇčanaj a patid…ôŇč. taw-kun sabaw ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aan " ¶ajwar~…ĺr~…ĺu ¶aj mińß ¶aan" tastas…ôŇč na ¶a ku mar~…ĺumanaj pabar~…ĺuńßaj a misaŇčan, naw kir~…ĺa ku ¶uk…ôd mar~…ĺa ba Ē~ °tuaj tu ku ¶uk…ôd, nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaku ¶ab…ôŇč mar~…ĺa ¶…ôŇča tu ku ¶ab…ôŇč, pana nu kawir~…ĺi kawana u ba Ē~ °tu t uku saŇčan tu bar~…ĺau Ē~ °d, mi ¶unus tu ta-sun-paw-tin, siŇčaŇčanan nu tańßudan atu matin…ôŇčaj tu sakaj babar~…ĺakian a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an, katukuńß ajda makaar~…ĺa tu ¶ajwar~…ĺs…ôp nu r~…ĺuitan. ,*********. sumamad a nipiasip tu sami, u namaka ńßan-ji "a*ar~…ĺokitas*ara", u " ¶iw-in", "sin-in-s…ôn", ¶i ¶u-fa-ńßu bu…ônsan paŇčińßa ńßan u "kun-s…ô-in-pu-sa", nan-p…ôi- ¶…ôw jiw- ¶in a ¶iw-muo-r~…ĺuo-s…ô-fa-s…ô u " kun-s…ô-in-pu-sa". "a*ar~…ĺokitas*ara",*"**","***", ". tan-taj s…ôn- ¶uŇč fa-s…ô misaŇčaaj tu sasakamu…ôn a tad…ômaw saan tu fan-ji " a*ar~…ĺokit…ô**ara" u kun- ¶…ô- ¶aj-pu-sa". "a*ar~…ĺokita" u "kun", " i**ara" u "sakar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj", u sakar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj tu udip nai Ē~ ° ku nidat…ôŇčan sa, sisa ¶i s…ôn- ¶un kamuńßan nida u kun- ¶…ô- ¶aj-pu-sa, mańßini nu ajdaaj a " pan-nuo-sin- ¶in". "a*ar~…ĺokit…ô**ara"*"*****"."a*ar~…ĺokita"*"*","i**ara"*"**", ". ir~…ĺajr~…ĺajan u, tan-taj- ¶un ¶i r~…ĺi-s…ô-min a ŇčaŇčan idaw ku " s…ô" ńßananaj a sur~…ĺitan, maŇčar~…ĺaj misak…ônis, sisa itawja "kun-s…ô-in-pu-sa" sumad ńßan tu "kun-in-pu-sa", nika idaw ku duma a sasakamu…ôn u "kun-in-pu-sa" u " kun-s…ô-in-pu-sa" a madajumaj a sasakamu…ôn. taŇč-taj- ¶in-r~…ĺ…ôn- ¶…ôn-kun fua-s…ô san tu itida i fan-w…ôn-ku ¶udadan idaw ku tusaaj a ¶aajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu ŇčaŇčanan, ¶ajsiwtupi ¶ mińß ¶aan sin- ¶iŇč namaka r~…ĺar~…ĺaaj a ¶udad nisur~…ĺitan tu nar~…ĺimaan ju sumamad sa, u *********** "a*ar~…ĺokitas*ara" u kun-in-pu-sa a ŇčaŇčan, ¶iw-muo-r~…ĺuo-s…ô pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i si-ji kitidaan, nikaadińßan tat…ôŇčan ujnijan a ¶udadan sa. sisa, kun-in-pu-sa ¶aaj kaw nikapir~…ĺijasan a nikatańß…ôkar~…ĺan, saan namaka taŇč-taj-s…ôn-in a nakamuan, ńßakija namaka ¶aajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu kitidaan a kamuan sa. (a*ar~…ĺokitas*ara) s*ara),***"**",a*ar~…ĺokitas*ara . kun-s…ô-in-pu-sa sipakajda i sur~…ĺit a mikajs…ôku u "kun- ¶a-s…ô- ¶in suni" a sami, namaka "miaw-fa-r~…ĺin- ¶in" a "kun-s…ô-in-pu-sa-pu-m…ôn-pin", anu idaw ku r~…ĺasubu mar~…ĺ…ôbut waŇč ji a tad…ômawan, mar~…ĺabad…ôs, makat…ôŇčir~…ĺ tu kun-s…ô-in-pu-sa, ¶a ¶aj ku bar~…ĺu ¶uaj a ŇčaŇčan, kun-s…ô-in-pu-sa kas…ônusa tu kun- ¶i-in-s…ôn, amańßur~…ĺak namin." idaw a ¶a ku kamu, " anu idaw ku katuudaj a tad…ômaw, jadańß ku r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj a nisimsiman, a ńßina asip tu kun-s…ô-in-pu-sa, kija mańßur~…ĺak ku r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj namaka bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °aj. anu jadańß sa ¶a ku bijar~…ĺaw tu sakaj r~…ĺuma Ē~ °an, kańßina asip tu kun-s…ô-in-pu-sa, kija mir~…ĺijas t uku r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶usaj tu namaka bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °aj". " ." kun-s…ô-in-pu-sa itida i ¶…ôn-w…ôn ********************** " sur~…ĺit nu ¶…ôŇč-ji, **nr*sigwaŇč ¶ńßug", u " kun- ¶…ô- ¶aj" a imian, mańßida ni s…ôn- ¶uŇč ku nikas…ôŇčian tu nakamuan. u ¶…ôŇč-w…ôn ńßananaj " kun- ¶…ô- ¶aj" r~…ĺima a puu Ē~ °an ku ¶…ôŇč-ji, ńßatidaaj nu sur~…ĺitan a ¶…ôŇč-w…ôn, atu namaka r~…ĺawajaj u "*airaisig" "kun, "j…ôn-s…ô" tur~…ĺu a bata ¶an, putun…ôn ku waŇčjug " ¶…ô- ¶aj" tusaaj a bata ¶an. :**nr*sigwaŇč ¶ńßug),**"***"**, "*airaisig "****,****"waŇčjug "****. itida i ta- ¶uŇč-ńßua kitidaan a mipajpajaj atu duma a mipajpajaj itini i papar~…ĺutat…ôŇčaan a paj-ji-kun-in, paj-ji-ta-s…ô, kun-in-ma namakajda i taŇč- ¶aw mi ¶uŇč par~…ĺutat…ôŇčaan a p*ndara **sin*, u tatajna a kun-in-pu-sa, ¶inida u kun-in-mu u r~…ĺin-ńßu-pu-mu atu r~…ĺin-ńßu-pu- ¶u, ¶aajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu aasip…ôn idaw ku ¶aajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu sur~…ĺitan, itini ni pu-kun nib…ôr~…ĺińßan tu ¶udadan a " itida i pu-ti nakamuan tu ¶a ¶ajaj a sur~…ĺitan nu t…ôn-r~…ĺun-wan- ¶in" u paj-ju-kun- ¶…ô- ¶aj, atu " u ¶uda ¶udadan nu aasip…ôn a sakaj samiaj nu ¶udadan" ŇčaŇčan ńßan u paj-ji-kun-s…ô-in-pu-sa, paj-s…ôn-kun-in, itini i san-u-wuj anibar~…ĺińßan tu ¶udad a "su-si-ti- ¶iw-r~…ĺuo- ¶in"ŇčaŇčan u kun-in-mu, idaw ńß…ônaj ¶i san-u-uj nakamuan tu nisur~…ĺitan a "ta-pi-r~…ĺu-su Ē~ °-na- ¶…ôn-fuo- ¶in-su" ŇčaŇčan u paj- ¶u- ¶u…ôn, kun-in-mu sidumaa ¶a tu paŇčaŇčan ¶i nidaanu r~…ĺi…ôn-ńßu-pu- ¶u. p*ndara **sin*, . katukuńß i sun-taj- ¶un a ¶udad, nib…ôr~…ĺińßan ni zu-s…ô a " saan ku di Ē~ °tu tajni ku ¶in-kan-san-ji satar~…ĺakawaj nu ¶a ¶ur~…ĺim…ôkan a ¶udad" atu " ńßatidaaj a ni ¶ur~…ĺim…ôkan nu kasiŇčaŇčanan a sakakaaj ¶i wan-ji-kuj" u ŇčaŇčan ¶i paj-ji-pu-sa, pusa u satabakiaj a tad…ômaw u ińß…ôkar~…ĺaj i tamtamdawan paŇčaŇčan ńßan ¶inida ¶i paj-ji-ta-s…ô ńßan kunikasiŇčaŇčanan. .
